incidents.title: Notification delays across system
incidents.description: Incident caused widespread impact requiring mitigation and RCA.
incidents.resolution: Applied hotfix to correct timeout configuration and redeployed service. Verified recovery via monitoring dashboards.

incidents.title: Login service intermittent failures
incidents.description: Incident caused widespread impact requiring mitigation and RCA.
incidents.resolution: Service was stabilized by rolling back the last deployment and restarting affected pods. Traffic gradually restored after cache warm-up.

incidents.title: Search service degradation
incidents.description: Incident caused widespread impact requiring mitigation and RCA.
incidents.resolution: Manually invalidated cache and triggered re-population. Confirmed consistency across services post fix.

incidents.resolution: Scaled up database connections and cleared stuck sessions. System performance returned to normal levels.
